commands.review_summary:
The PR wires the existing Skill Workshop view/controller into the Control UI app shell, adds app state for workshop filters/mode/preview, and scopes Board navigation to filtered proposals.

PR surface: Source +120. Total +120 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes `/skills/workshop` and loads proposals, but `renderApp` has no `skillWorkshop` branch to render the tab body. I did not run a live browser session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor action is needed because the PR is externally authored and lacks real Control UI behavior proof; no narrow code repair is identified.

target.title: fix(ui): render skill workshop tab
target.body:
## Summary
- Render the Skill Workshop tab through the Control UI app shell.
- Wire the existing Skill Workshop lifecycle actions, revision handoff, file preview, mode, filters, and layout classes into `renderApp`.
- Keep Board Previous/Next navigation scoped to the currently visible filtered proposal list.
- Reuse the Skill Workshop controller state contract from `AppViewState` to avoid duplicating the workshop field list.

## Verification
- `pnpm format:check -- ui/src/ui/app-render.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/skill-workshop.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Opening `/skills/workshop` now renders the Skill Workshop tab, and Board Previous/Next navigation follows the visible filtered proposal list instead of hidden proposals.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, branch `fix/skill-workshop-render`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm format:check -- ui/src/ui/app-render.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/skill-workshop.ts`; `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`.

Evidence after fix: Format check passed for all four touched files; UI test TypeScript project passed through `scripts/run-tsgo.mjs`.

Observed result after fix: The render wiring type-checks with the Skill Workshop state and uses `filterSkillWorkshopProposals` for relative proposal navigation.

What was not tested: I did not run a browser/manual Control UI session or full UI test suite.
target.author: solvely-colin
